sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this fighting game

special_mechanics.name: Character Speed Variation
special_mechanics.description: Three playable characters with different movement speeds and gameplay styles: Buzz (strong/slow), Ty (agile/fast), Kato (quick)

special_mechanics.name: Super Move
special_mechanics.description: Pressing all three buttons simultaneously triggers a character-specific super move attack

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Source is Wikipedia article which documents gameplay mechanics and character attributes but contains no quantitative physics parameters, sub-pixel precision data, or movement values. Fighting game genre typically does not document precise physics values in public sources.
